# Certinator AI — Copilot Instructions

Certinator AI is a multi-agent system that can effectively assist students in their preparation for Microsoft certification exams.

## Certinator AI Guidelines

* [Project Vision and Goals](../PROJECT.md): Understand the high-level vision and objectives of the project to ensure alignment with the intended outcomes.
* [System Architecture and Design Principles](../ARCHITECTURE.md): Overall system architecture, design patterns, and design principles that guide the development process.
